---
title: "Talks"
listing:
  - id: talks-list
    contents: talks.yml
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/talks/listing.ejs
  - id: workshops-list
    contents: workshops.yml
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/talks/listing.ejs
title-block-banner: "#FB9E07"
page-layout: full
toc: false
date-format: "D MMMM, YYYY"
---

## Presentations

:::{#talks-list}
:::

## Workshops
:::{#workshops-list}
:::
